TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Takaray sowal == Roytin Hontian Kitakit , o itiraay i Skantinawiya Pecihan Kanatal itira i Saka'misan Yoropa, o tatapangan a niyaro' o Stokormo . O kaitiraan no sifo, Pikaykian no Kitakit ato loma' no hontai itiniay tona taokay Stokormo.ona tokay itiraay i sakawalian a riyar, mingataay to PolotiRiyar, isaicomod no Milalon Fanaw, tadamakapahay kona pala itini, o pirenokan no mipalafangay.ilaloma' no tokay ira ko 14 a kanatal ato cecay a pecihankanatal, 70 ko kayakay ko pakalitilitingay tona tata'angay niyaro',matiya o "isaka'amisay a winis". Itiya ho i saka 13 sici, ona Stokormo tokay kaitiraan no sici, ponka, kicay ato picolo'an. Ona tokay caay ka haop no lalood, orasaka, masongila' ko katelik tahanini, anini ira ko safw no 400 so'ot ko pi'arawan to dafong a loma', mapa'araw ko masamaamaanay a dafong,ono rikisi, finacadan, palapalaan ato sasongilaan. O kasofocan ni Arforoy Nopir ko Stokormo. Nani 1901 miheca misatapang, itira i saka12 folad saka10 romi'ad misaharateng cingranan i lalomaan, o honti no Royti ko pafeliay to Nopir Hofi, malaheci i, itira i sifoan a kakomaenan a pakalafi to lafang. Kaitiraan Itiraay i saka'amis no Yoropa ko kitiraan nona kitakit, isakawali no Skantiwiya Pecihan Kanatal, isawali misi'ayaw to PolotiRiyar ato Potiniya Kihaw, orasaka, ira ko ka'edaway a lilis no riyar. Isaka'etip o Skantiwiya Lotolotokan, onini o kalala'edan ato Nowi kitakit. O kakahad no sera no Roytin ira ko 449,964 km², o maedengay a malaliomah a sera mahaop ko 7.0%, i sakalima ko kakahad i Yoropa, o sakakaay ko kakahad i Ka'amisay Yoropa. O pala kocedis a kakaya',nani ka'amis tayra timol ira ko 1574 kilo, nani sa'etip tara wa li ira ko 500 kilo, nani ka'amis tara timol a malikelon. Pakitinien i pala ko pisiiked, toloay etal:saka'amis o Norlan Takaeaway Dafda, adihay ko lotok,kakahad ko kilakilangan; Swialan itiraay i sifo' no sakatimol, sahetoay o tapolo a sera,ira ko 9 ofad a fanaw; isakatimol o Yietalan, o katatekoan no Smolan Dahetal ato ci'afoay a Skona Dafdaf. mahaop ko 15% a sera itiraay i ka'amis ho no Pocok no Saka'amis. O sakakaay a kanatal o Kotolan Kanatal ato Wolan Kanatal; WinaenFanaw,Witoen Fanaw ato MilalonFanaw. O itiraay i katimol a WoleEtal ato isifo'ay a MilalonFanaw sakakaay ko kakodefet no tamdaw a maro'. Tamdaw O tamdaw no Roytin o sasafaay ko lonok sanay a sofoc,o sato'edaway ko lalen a 'orip ato sakakaay ko kaliteng no 'orip a kitakit. O polong no tamdaw mahaop ko 90% masacecayay i katimol ato sasifo'an a etal maro', sakakaay ko ka'aloman no tamdaw i, o Stokormo, Kotopow ato Maormo a maro' tona toloay tokay. I 2004 miheca saka 8 folad a sa'osi to tamdaw, satapang sa a malafas to 900 ofad, i 2017 miheca saka 1 folad saka 20 romi'ad, o patokiay a tamdaw no Roytin cilafas to 1000 ofad. itini a mahapinangan ko pisalinahlinah a maro' no tamdaw. I sa'aya'ayaw ho i, o matayalay a tayni a tamdaw ko 'alomanay, to ikor to i, o maforaway a tamdaw. I 2010 a pisolap mahaop ko 14.3 % o maforaway tamdaw, 9,2% caay ko nani Yoropaay tamdaw, 'edeng 5.1% o nani roma a kitakit no Yoropa a tamdaw. O maforaway a tamdaw o nani Fenlan,Torki,Toic,Tanmay,Norway, Polan, Ilako ato nani 'ayaway Nanslafo. I 2005 miheca a pisa'osi o nani Ka'amisay Yoropa ira ko 20,162 tamdaw, nani Aciyaay ira ko 16,739 tamdaw, nani Afrika ira ko 5,625 tamadaw, o nani LatinAmirika ira 2,655 tamdaw. Sowal Ona sifoan a sowal o Roytin Sowal, onini i, o Ka'amisay-Luerman ono Indo-Yoropa Rayray, o Skantinawiya sowal hananay ho a mitahidang, miriniay to sowal no Tanmay ato Norwi, nikawrira, o ngiha' ato pitilid cowa ka lecad. O Norwi ato Tanmay a tamdaw rahodayay a mafana' to sowal no Roytin. 2009 miheca saka 7 folad saka 1 romi'ad, malaheci a misanga' ko fa'elohay a rikec no sowal, o malasifoan a sowal ko Roytin a sowal. O sowal no Roytin malasifoan a sowal han?halafin ko kacacoli tonini, i 2005 miheca ira ko pasadak to sasanga'en a rikec to sapihayaw to malosifoan sowal, nikawrira, caay ka laheci kona rikec. O sakaay a sowal ko sowal no Roytin, ono mamangay ko finacadan a sowal ira ko Fenlan sowal, Mian sowal, Sami sowal, Romu sowal ato Itisyu sowal. Masiwar no katenak no kalali'aca to dafong, o Ikiris sowal malasamatenakay sowal itini i Roytin. I ikor no 1849 miheca, o malahatatanamen koawcong pitilidan a sowal ko Ikiris, i ikor no 1940 miheca, malahatatanamen no polong a pitilidan ko Ikiris, matiya o Sypanya sowal, Toiv sowal, Fransu sowal ato Italiya sowal. Pitooran I'ayaw no 11 sici, mita'ong to kawakawas no Ka'amisay Yoropa,ono to'asan ho a pitooran konini, o Uposala Pita'ongan i, o kahiceran no mitooray konini. Tahira to saka 11 sici micomod to ko Kristo Pitooran, mafalic to ko rikec no kitakit milalang tono to'asan a pitooran, tangasa i saka 19 sici ta malahedaw kono to'asan a pitooran. I 1530 miheca ira ko pisalof to pitooran cowa ka pitoor to Tinsikiw ko lalomaan no hoti, o Fa'elohay Kristo ko pitooran. Ikor tono 18 sici, ta manga'ay ko mitooray to Yotaya ato Tinsikiw mipatenak to sowal no Pa'oripay i Roytin. 1951 miheca, mapacomod i rikec ko paifaloco'ay ko pitoor sanay tilid. 2000 miheca, laheci han to a misasip palasawad ko Royrin Kiwkai , caay to nitolo'an no kitakit a pitooran. Pakiraen i sa'osi, o tamdaw no Roytin ira ko 275,000 ko tamdaw cowa ko naifaloco'ay ko pitooran, o maforaway a tayni ira ko 92,000 ko tamdaw o Tinsikiw ko pitooran,100,000 ko tamdaw mitooray to Sa'etipay So'elinay Kiwkai, 500,000 ko tamdaw o Musulin. Tooren ko sa'osi i 2005 miheca, ira ko 23% a Roytin tamdaw paso'elin to Kawas, mahaop ko 53% tamdaw pakaso'elin iraay ko tadamaanay a 'icel no salo'afang ato 'Orip, 23% caay ka paso'elin to Kawas ato 'icel no salo'afang ato 'Orip. O Uposala Sikyo Etal , i 1287 miheca a mapatireng, o aniniay a kiwkai i, i 1885-1893 miheca a patirengen. O 'akawang i, ira ko 118.7 laya',o sakakaay i Skantinawiya konini a kiwkai. Yo patireng i, o kiwkai no Roma Tinsikiw, o pipacalokan to honti ato pitademan itini, ikor no Pisalof to Pitooran, o Kiwkai no Roytin ko maro'ay itini, anini i, o kamaro'an no Uposala Sikyo. Pacefafay tilid " ,"Pocket Facts: Statistics on Integration" ,ISBN 91-89609-30-1 - 於2007年7月10日查閱. 瑞典移民局,"Pocket Facts: Statistics on Integration" ,ISBN 91-89609-30-1 - 於2007年7月10 / . Landes, David (1 July 2009). "Swedish becomes official 'main language'". The Local. thelocal.se. Retrieved 15 July 2009. " "(Svenskan blir inte officiellt språk) "(Pressmeddelande: I dag börjar språklagen gälla!) 2006-05-24.(PDF . CIA 外交部
S.PHON: == takaraj so~uwaɾ == ro~ujtin ħo~untian kitakit , o~u itiraaj i skantinawija pəʦiħan kanataɾ itira i sakaʡmisan jo~uro~upa, o~u tatapaŋan a nijaro~uʡ o~u sto~uko~urmo~u . o~u kaitiraan no~u sifo~u, pikajkian no~u kitakit ato~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u ħo~untai itiniaj to~una tao~ukaj sto~uko~urmo~u.o~una to~ukaj itiraaj i sakawaɾian a rijar, miŋataaj to~u po~uɾo~utirijar, isaiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u miɾaɾo~un fanaw, taɬ~ɮamakapaħaj ko~una paɾa itini, o~u pirəno~ukan no~u mipaɾafaŋaj.iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u to~ukaj ira ko~u ** a kanataɾ ato~u ʦəʦaj a pəʦiħankanataɾ, ** ko~u kajakaj ko~u pakaɾitiɾitiŋaj to~una tataʡaŋaj nijaro~uʡ,matija o~u "isakaʡamisaj a winis". itija ħo~u i saka ** siʦi, o~una sto~uko~urmo~u to~ukaj kaitiraan no~u siʦi, po~unka, kiʦaj ato~u piʦo~uɾo~uʡan. o~una to~ukaj ʦaaj ka ħao~up no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~urasaka, maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u katəɾik taħanini, anini ira ko~u safw no~u *** so~uʡo~ut ko~u piʡarawan to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ a ɾo~umaʡ, mapaʡaraw ko~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ,o~uno~u rikisi, finaʦaɬ~ɮan, paɾapaɾaan ato~u saso~uŋiɾaan. o~u kaso~ufo~uʦan ni arfo~uro~uj no~upir ko~u sto~uko~urmo~u. nani **** miħəʦa misatapaŋ, itira i saka** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ misaħaratəŋ ʦiŋranan i ɾaɾo~umaan, o~u ħo~unti no~u ro~ujti ko~u pafəɾiaj to~u no~upir ħo~ufi, maɾaħəʦi i, itira i sifo~uan a kako~umaənan a pakaɾafi to~u ɾafaŋ. kaitiraan itiraaj i sakaʡamis no~u jo~uro~upa ko~u kitiraan no~una kitakit, isakawaɾi no~u skantiwija pəʦiħan kanataɾ, isawaɾi misiʡajaw to~u po~uɾo~utirijar ato~u po~utinija kiħaw, o~urasaka, ira ko~u kaʡəɬ~ɮawaj a ɾiɾis no~u rijar. isakaʡətip o~u skantiwija ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan, o~unini o~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮan ato~u no~uwi kitakit. o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra no~u ro~ujtin ira ko~u ***,*** km*, o~u maəɬ~ɮəŋaj a maɾaɾio~umaħ a səra maħao~up ko~u *.*%, i sakaɾima ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ i jo~uro~upa, o~u sakakaaj ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ i kaʡamisaj jo~uro~upa. o~u paɾa ko~uʦəɬ~ɮis a kakajaʡ,nani kaʡamis tajra timo~uɾ ira ko~u **** kiɾo~u, nani saʡətip tara wa ɾi ira ko~u *** kiɾo~u, nani kaʡamis tara timo~uɾ a maɾikəɾo~un. pakitiniən i paɾa ko~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ, to~uɾo~uaj ətaɾ:sakaʡamis o~u no~urɾan takaəawaj ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮa, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɾo~uto~uk,kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u kiɾakiɾaŋan; swiaɾan itiraaj i sifo~uʡ no~u sakatimo~uɾ, saħəto~uaj o~u tapo~uɾo~u a səra,ira ko~u * o~ufaɬ~ɮ a fanaw; isakatimo~uɾ o~u jiətaɾan, o~u katatəko~uan no~u smo~uɾan ɬ~ɮaħətaɾ ato~u ʦiʡafo~uaj a sko~una ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf. maħao~up ko~u **% a səra itiraaj i kaʡamis ħo~u no~u po~uʦo~uk no~u sakaʡamis. o~u sakakaaj a kanataɾ o~u ko~uto~uɾan kanataɾ ato~u wo~uɾan kanataɾ; winaənfanaw,wito~uən fanaw ato~u miɾaɾo~unfanaw. o~u itiraaj i katimo~uɾ a wo~uɾəətaɾ ato~u isifo~uʡaj a miɾaɾo~unfanaw sakakaaj ko~u kako~uɬ~ɮəfət no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡ. tamɬ~ɮaw o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ro~ujtin o~u sasafaaj ko~u ɾo~uno~uk sanaj a so~ufo~uʦ,o~u sato~uʡəɬ~ɮawaj ko~u ɾaɾən a ʡo~urip ato~u sakakaaj ko~u kaɾitəŋ no~u ʡo~urip a kitakit. o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw maħao~up ko~u **% masaʦəʦajaj i katimo~uɾ ato~u sasifo~uʡan a ətaɾ maro~uʡ, sakakaaj ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, o~u sto~uko~urmo~u, ko~uto~upo~uw ato~u mao~urmo~u a maro~uʡ to~una to~uɾo~uaj to~ukaj. i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a saʡo~usi to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, satapaŋ sa a maɾafas to~u *** o~ufaɬ~ɮ, i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u pato~ukiaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ro~ujtin ʦiɾafas to~u **** o~ufaɬ~ɮ. itini a maħapinaŋan ko~u pisaɾinaħɾinaħ a maro~uʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. i saʡajaʡajaw ħo~u i, o~u matajaɾaj a tajni a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, to~u iko~ur to~u i, o~u mafo~urawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. i **** a piso~uɾap maħao~up ko~u **.* % o~u mafo~urawaj tamɬ~ɮaw, *,*% ʦaaj ko~u nani jo~uro~upaaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ʡəɬ~ɮəŋ *.*% o~u nani ro~uma a kitakit no~u jo~uro~upa a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u mafo~urawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u nani fənɾan,to~urki,to~uiʦ,tanmaj,no~urwaj, po~uɾan, iɾako~u ato~u nani ʡajawaj nansɾafo~u. i **** miħəʦa a pisaʡo~usi o~u nani kaʡamisaj jo~uro~upa ira ko~u **,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, nani aʦijaaj ira ko~u **,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, nani afrika ira ko~u *,*** tamaɬ~ɮaw, o~u nani ɾatinamirika ira *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw. so~uwaɾ o~una sifo~uan a so~uwaɾ o~u ro~ujtin so~uwaɾ, o~unini i, o~u kaʡamisaj-ɾo~u~uərman o~uno~u inɬ~ɮo~u-jo~uro~upa rajraj, o~u skantinawija so~uwaɾ ħananaj ħo~u a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, miriniaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tanmaj ato~u no~urwi, nikawrira, o~u ŋiħaʡ ato~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦo~uwa ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ. o~u no~urwi ato~u tanmaj a tamɬ~ɮaw raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj a mafanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ro~ujtin. **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maɾaħəʦi a misaŋaʡ ko~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a rikəʦ no~u so~uwaɾ, o~u maɾasifo~uan a so~uwaɾ ko~u ro~ujtin a so~uwaɾ. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ro~ujtin maɾasifo~uan a so~uwaɾ ħan?ħaɾafin ko~u kaʦaʦo~uɾi to~unini, i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u pasaɬ~ɮak to~u sasaŋaʡən a rikəʦ to~u sapiħajaw to~u maɾo~usifo~uan so~uwaɾ, nikawrira, ʦaaj ka ɾaħəʦi ko~una rikəʦ. o~u sakaaj a so~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ro~ujtin, o~uno~u mamaŋaj ko~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ira ko~u fənɾan so~uwaɾ, mian so~uwaɾ, sami so~uwaɾ, ro~umo~u~u so~uwaɾ ato~u itisjo~u~u so~uwaɾ. masiwar no~u katənak no~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦa to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, o~u ikiris so~uwaɾ maɾasamatənakaj so~uwaɾ itini i ro~ujtin. i iko~ur no~u **** miħəʦa, o~u maɾaħatatanamən ko~uawʦo~uŋ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ko~u ikiris, i iko~ur no~u **** miħəʦa, maɾaħatatanamən no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u ikiris, matija o~u sjpanja so~uwaɾ, to~uib~v so~uwaɾ, franso~u~u so~uwaɾ ato~u itaɾija so~uwaɾ. pito~uo~uran iʡajaw no~u ** siʦi, mitaʡo~uŋ to~u kawakawas no~u kaʡamisaj jo~uro~upa,o~uno~u to~uʡasan ħo~u a pito~uo~uran ko~unini, o~u o~u~upo~usaɾa pitaʡo~uŋan i, o~u kaħiʦəran no~u mito~uo~uraj ko~unini. taħira to~u saka ** siʦi miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kristo~u pito~uo~uran, mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u rikəʦ no~u kitakit miɾaɾaŋ to~uno~u to~uʡasan a pito~uo~uran, taŋasa i saka ** siʦi ta maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~uno~u to~uʡasan a pito~uo~uran. i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u pisaɾo~uf to~u pito~uo~uran ʦo~uwa ka pito~uo~ur to~u tinsikiw ko~u ɾaɾo~umaan no~u ħo~uti, o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kristo~u ko~u pito~uo~uran. iko~ur to~uno~u ** siʦi, ta maŋaʡaj ko~u mito~uo~uraj to~u jo~utaja ato~u tinsikiw mipatənak to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paʡo~uripaj i ro~ujtin. **** miħəʦa, mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i rikəʦ ko~u paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ko~u pito~uo~ur sanaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ. **** miħəʦa, ɾaħəʦi ħan to~u a misasip paɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u ro~ujrin kiwkai , ʦaaj to~u nito~uɾo~uʡan no~u kitakit a pito~uo~uran. pakiraən i saʡo~usi, o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ro~ujtin ira ko~u ***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa ko~u naifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ko~u pito~uo~uran, o~u mafo~urawaj a tajni ira ko~u **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u tinsikiw ko~u pito~uo~uran,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mito~uo~uraj to~u saʡətipaj so~uʡəɾinaj kiwkai, ***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u mo~u~uso~u~uɾin. to~uo~urən ko~u saʡo~usi i **** miħəʦa, ira ko~u **% a ro~ujtin tamɬ~ɮaw paso~uʡəɾin to~u kawas, maħao~up ko~u **% tamɬ~ɮaw pakaso~uʡəɾin iraaj ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ʡiʦəɾ no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ ato~u ʡo~urip, **% ʦaaj ka paso~uʡəɾin to~u kawas ato~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ ato~u ʡo~urip. o~u o~u~upo~usaɾa sikjo~u ətaɾ , i **** miħəʦa a mapatirəŋ, o~u aniniaj a kiwkai i, i ****-**** miħəʦa a patirəŋən. o~u ʡakawaŋ i, ira ko~u ***.* ɾajaʡ,o~u sakakaaj i skantinawija ko~unini a kiwkai. jo~u patirəŋ i, o~u kiwkai no~u ro~uma tinsikiw, o~u pipaʦaɾo~ukan to~u ħo~unti ato~u pitaɬ~ɮəman itini, iko~ur no~u pisaɾo~uf to~u pito~uo~uran, o~u kiwkai no~u ro~ujtin ko~u maro~uʡaj itini, anini i, o~u kamaro~uʡan no~u o~u~upo~usaɾa sikjo~u. paʦəfafaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ " ,"po~uʦkət faʦts: statistiʦs o~un intə*ratio~un" ,isb~b~vn **-*****-**-* - *************. *****,"po~uʦkət faʦts: statistiʦs o~un intə*ratio~un" ,isb~b~vn **-*****-**-* - ********** / . ɾanɬ~ɮəs, ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ (* *o~u~uɾj ****). "swəɬ~ɮisħ b~b~vəʦo~uməs o~uffiʦiaɾ ʡmain ɾaŋo~u~ua*əʡ". tħə ɾo~uʦaɾ. tħəɾo~uʦaɾ.sə. rətriəb~vəɬ~ɮ ** *o~u~uɾj ****. " "(sb~vənskan b~b~vɾir intə o~uffiʦiəɾɾt spr*k) "(prəssməɬ~ɮɬ~ɮəɾanɬ~ɮə: i ɬ~ɮa* b~b~v*rjar spr*kɾa*ən **ɾɾa!) ****-**-**.(pɬ~ɮf . ʦia ***
S.FORM: == Takaray sowal == Roytin Hontian Kitakit , o itiraay i Skantinawiya Pecihan Kanatal itira i Saka'misan Yoropa, o tatapangan a niyaro' o Stokormo . O kaitiraan no sifo, Pikaykian no Kitakit ato loma' no hontai itiniay tona taokay Stokormo.ona tokay itiraay i sakawalian a riyar, mingataay to PolotiRiyar, isaicomod no Milalon Fanaw, tadamakapahay kona pala itini, o pirenokan no mipalafangay.ilaloma' no tokay ira ko 14 a kanatal ato cecay a pecihankanatal, 70 ko kayakay ko pakalitilitingay tona tata'angay niyaro',matiya o "isaka'amisay a winis". Itiya ho i saka 13 sici, ona Stokormo tokay kaitiraan no sici, ponka, kicay ato picolo'an. Ona tokay caay ka haop no lalood, orasaka, masongila' ko katelik tahanini, anini ira ko safw no 400 so'ot ko pi'arawan to dafong a loma', mapa'araw ko masamaamaanay a dafong,ono rikisi, finacadan, palapalaan ato sasongilaan. O kasofocan ni Arforoy Nopir ko Stokormo. Nani 1901 miheca misatapang, itira i saka12 folad saka10 romi'ad misaharateng cingranan i lalomaan, o honti no Royti ko pafeliay to Nopir Hofi, malaheci i, itira i sifoan a kakomaenan a pakalafi to lafang. Kaitiraan Itiraay i saka'amis no Yoropa ko kitiraan nona kitakit, isakawali no Skantiwiya Pecihan Kanatal, isawali misi'ayaw to PolotiRiyar ato Potiniya Kihaw, orasaka, ira ko ka'edaway a lilis no riyar. Isaka'etip o Skantiwiya Lotolotokan, onini o kalala'edan ato Nowi kitakit. O kakahad no sera no Roytin ira ko 449,964 km², o maedengay a malaliomah a sera mahaop ko 7.0%, i sakalima ko kakahad i Yoropa, o sakakaay ko kakahad i Ka'amisay Yoropa. O pala kocedis a kakaya',nani ka'amis tayra timol ira ko 1574 kilo, nani sa'etip tara wa li ira ko 500 kilo, nani ka'amis tara timol a malikelon. Pakitinien i pala ko pisiiked, toloay etal:saka'amis o Norlan Takaeaway Dafda, adihay ko lotok,kakahad ko kilakilangan; Swialan itiraay i sifo' no sakatimol, sahetoay o tapolo a sera,ira ko 9 ofad a fanaw; isakatimol o Yietalan, o katatekoan no Smolan Dahetal ato ci'afoay a Skona Dafdaf. mahaop ko 15% a sera itiraay i ka'amis ho no Pocok no Saka'amis. O sakakaay a kanatal o Kotolan Kanatal ato Wolan Kanatal; WinaenFanaw,Witoen Fanaw ato MilalonFanaw. O itiraay i katimol a WoleEtal ato isifo'ay a MilalonFanaw sakakaay ko kakodefet no tamdaw a maro'. Tamdaw O tamdaw no Roytin o sasafaay ko lonok sanay a sofoc,o sato'edaway ko lalen a 'orip ato sakakaay ko kaliteng no 'orip a kitakit. O polong no tamdaw mahaop ko 90% masacecayay i katimol ato sasifo'an a etal maro', sakakaay ko ka'aloman no tamdaw i, o Stokormo, Kotopow ato Maormo a maro' tona toloay tokay. I 2004 miheca saka 8 folad a sa'osi to tamdaw, satapang sa a malafas to 900 ofad, i 2017 miheca saka 1 folad saka 20 romi'ad, o patokiay a tamdaw no Roytin cilafas to 1000 ofad. itini a mahapinangan ko pisalinahlinah a maro' no tamdaw. I sa'aya'ayaw ho i, o matayalay a tayni a tamdaw ko 'alomanay, to ikor to i, o maforaway a tamdaw. I 2010 a pisolap mahaop ko 14.3 % o maforaway tamdaw, 9,2% caay ko nani Yoropaay tamdaw, 'edeng 5.1% o nani roma a kitakit no Yoropa a tamdaw. O maforaway a tamdaw o nani Fenlan,Torki,Toic,Tanmay,Norway, Polan, Ilako ato nani 'ayaway Nanslafo. I 2005 miheca a pisa'osi o nani Ka'amisay Yoropa ira ko 20,162 tamdaw, nani Aciyaay ira ko 16,739 tamdaw, nani Afrika ira ko 5,625 tamadaw, o nani LatinAmirika ira 2,655 tamdaw. Sowal Ona sifoan a sowal o Roytin Sowal, onini i, o Ka'amisay-Luerman ono Indo-Yoropa Rayray, o Skantinawiya sowal hananay ho a mitahidang, miriniay to sowal no Tanmay ato Norwi, nikawrira, o ngiha' ato pitilid cowa ka lecad. O Norwi ato Tanmay a tamdaw rahodayay a mafana' to sowal no Roytin. 2009 miheca saka 7 folad saka 1 romi'ad, malaheci a misanga' ko fa'elohay a rikec no sowal, o malasifoan a sowal ko Roytin a sowal. O sowal no Roytin malasifoan a sowal han?halafin ko kacacoli tonini, i 2005 miheca ira ko pasadak to sasanga'en a rikec to sapihayaw to malosifoan sowal, nikawrira, caay ka laheci kona rikec. O sakaay a sowal ko sowal no Roytin, ono mamangay ko finacadan a sowal ira ko Fenlan sowal, Mian sowal, Sami sowal, Romu sowal ato Itisyu sowal. Masiwar no katenak no kalali'aca to dafong, o Ikiris sowal malasamatenakay sowal itini i Roytin. I ikor no 1849 miheca, o malahatatanamen koawcong pitilidan a sowal ko Ikiris, i ikor no 1940 miheca, malahatatanamen no polong a pitilidan ko Ikiris, matiya o Sypanya sowal, Toiv sowal, Fransu sowal ato Italiya sowal. Pitooran I'ayaw no 11 sici, mita'ong to kawakawas no Ka'amisay Yoropa,ono to'asan ho a pitooran konini, o Uposala Pita'ongan i, o kahiceran no mitooray konini. Tahira to saka 11 sici micomod to ko Kristo Pitooran, mafalic to ko rikec no kitakit milalang tono to'asan a pitooran, tangasa i saka 19 sici ta malahedaw kono to'asan a pitooran. I 1530 miheca ira ko pisalof to pitooran cowa ka pitoor to Tinsikiw ko lalomaan no hoti, o Fa'elohay Kristo ko pitooran. Ikor tono 18 sici, ta manga'ay ko mitooray to Yotaya ato Tinsikiw mipatenak to sowal no Pa'oripay i Roytin. 1951 miheca, mapacomod i rikec ko paifaloco'ay ko pitoor sanay tilid. 2000 miheca, laheci han to a misasip palasawad ko Royrin Kiwkai , caay to nitolo'an no kitakit a pitooran. Pakiraen i sa'osi, o tamdaw no Roytin ira ko 275,000 ko tamdaw cowa ko naifaloco'ay ko pitooran, o maforaway a tayni ira ko 92,000 ko tamdaw o Tinsikiw ko pitooran,100,000 ko tamdaw mitooray to Sa'etipay So'elinay Kiwkai, 500,000 ko tamdaw o Musulin. Tooren ko sa'osi i 2005 miheca, ira ko 23% a Roytin tamdaw paso'elin to Kawas, mahaop ko 53% tamdaw pakaso'elin iraay ko tadamaanay a 'icel no salo'afang ato 'Orip, 23% caay ka paso'elin to Kawas ato 'icel no salo'afang ato 'Orip. O Uposala Sikyo Etal , i 1287 miheca a mapatireng, o aniniay a kiwkai i, i 1885-1893 miheca a patirengen. O 'akawang i, ira ko 118.7 laya',o sakakaay i Skantinawiya konini a kiwkai. Yo patireng i, o kiwkai no Roma Tinsikiw, o pipacalokan to honti ato pitademan itini, ikor no Pisalof to Pitooran, o Kiwkai no Roytin ko maro'ay itini, anini i, o kamaro'an no Uposala Sikyo. Pacefafay tilid " ,"Pocket Facts: Statistics on Integration" ,ISBN 91-89609-30-1 - 於2007年7月10日查閱. 瑞典移民局,"Pocket Facts: Statistics on Integration" ,ISBN 91-89609-30-1 - 於2007年7月10 / . Landes, David (1 July 2009). "Swedish becomes official 'main language'". The Local. thelocal.se. Retrieved 15 July 2009. " "(Svenskan blir inte officiellt språk) "(Pressmeddelande: I dag börjar språklagen gälla!) 2006-05-24.(PDF . CIA 外交部
S.PHON: == takaraj so~uwaɾ == ro~ujtin ħo~untian kitakit , o~u itiraaj i skantinawija pəʦiħan kanataɾ itira i sakaʡmisan jo~uro~upa, o~u tatapaŋan a nijaro~uʡ o~u sto~uko~urmo~u . o~u kaitiraan no~u sifo~u, pikajkian no~u kitakit ato~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u ħo~untai itiniaj to~una tao~ukaj sto~uko~urmo~u.o~una to~ukaj itiraaj i sakawaɾian a rijar, miŋataaj to~u po~uɾo~utirijar, isaiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u miɾaɾo~un fanaw, taɬ~ɮamakapaħaj ko~una paɾa itini, o~u pirəno~ukan no~u mipaɾafaŋaj.iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u to~ukaj ira ko~u ** a kanataɾ ato~u ʦəʦaj a pəʦiħankanataɾ, ** ko~u kajakaj ko~u pakaɾitiɾitiŋaj to~una tataʡaŋaj nijaro~uʡ,matija o~u "isakaʡamisaj a winis". itija ħo~u i saka ** siʦi, o~una sto~uko~urmo~u to~ukaj kaitiraan no~u siʦi, po~unka, kiʦaj ato~u piʦo~uɾo~uʡan. o~una to~ukaj ʦaaj ka ħao~up no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~urasaka, maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u katəɾik taħanini, anini ira ko~u safw no~u *** so~uʡo~ut ko~u piʡarawan to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ a ɾo~umaʡ, mapaʡaraw ko~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ,o~uno~u rikisi, finaʦaɬ~ɮan, paɾapaɾaan ato~u saso~uŋiɾaan. o~u kaso~ufo~uʦan ni arfo~uro~uj no~upir ko~u sto~uko~urmo~u. nani **** miħəʦa misatapaŋ, itira i saka** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ misaħaratəŋ ʦiŋranan i ɾaɾo~umaan, o~u ħo~unti no~u ro~ujti ko~u pafəɾiaj to~u no~upir ħo~ufi, maɾaħəʦi i, itira i sifo~uan a kako~umaənan a pakaɾafi to~u ɾafaŋ. kaitiraan itiraaj i sakaʡamis no~u jo~uro~upa ko~u kitiraan no~una kitakit, isakawaɾi no~u skantiwija pəʦiħan kanataɾ, isawaɾi misiʡajaw to~u po~uɾo~utirijar ato~u po~utinija kiħaw, o~urasaka, ira ko~u kaʡəɬ~ɮawaj a ɾiɾis no~u rijar. isakaʡətip o~u skantiwija ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan, o~unini o~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮan ato~u no~uwi kitakit. o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u səra no~u ro~ujtin ira ko~u ***,*** km*, o~u maəɬ~ɮəŋaj a maɾaɾio~umaħ a səra maħao~up ko~u *.*%, i sakaɾima ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ i jo~uro~upa, o~u sakakaaj ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ i kaʡamisaj jo~uro~upa. o~u paɾa ko~uʦəɬ~ɮis a kakajaʡ,nani kaʡamis tajra timo~uɾ ira ko~u **** kiɾo~u, nani saʡətip tara wa ɾi ira ko~u *** kiɾo~u, nani kaʡamis tara timo~uɾ a maɾikəɾo~un. pakitiniən i paɾa ko~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ, to~uɾo~uaj ətaɾ:sakaʡamis o~u no~urɾan takaəawaj ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮa, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɾo~uto~uk,kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u kiɾakiɾaŋan; swiaɾan itiraaj i sifo~uʡ no~u sakatimo~uɾ, saħəto~uaj o~u tapo~uɾo~u a səra,ira ko~u * o~ufaɬ~ɮ a fanaw; isakatimo~uɾ o~u jiətaɾan, o~u katatəko~uan no~u smo~uɾan ɬ~ɮaħətaɾ ato~u ʦiʡafo~uaj a sko~una ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf. maħao~up ko~u **% a səra itiraaj i kaʡamis ħo~u no~u po~uʦo~uk no~u sakaʡamis. o~u sakakaaj a kanataɾ o~u ko~uto~uɾan kanataɾ ato~u wo~uɾan kanataɾ; winaənfanaw,wito~uən fanaw ato~u miɾaɾo~unfanaw. o~u itiraaj i katimo~uɾ a wo~uɾəətaɾ ato~u isifo~uʡaj a miɾaɾo~unfanaw sakakaaj ko~u kako~uɬ~ɮəfət no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡ. tamɬ~ɮaw o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ro~ujtin o~u sasafaaj ko~u ɾo~uno~uk sanaj a so~ufo~uʦ,o~u sato~uʡəɬ~ɮawaj ko~u ɾaɾən a ʡo~urip ato~u sakakaaj ko~u kaɾitəŋ no~u ʡo~urip a kitakit. o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw maħao~up ko~u **% masaʦəʦajaj i katimo~uɾ ato~u sasifo~uʡan a ətaɾ maro~uʡ, sakakaaj ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, o~u sto~uko~urmo~u, ko~uto~upo~uw ato~u mao~urmo~u a maro~uʡ to~una to~uɾo~uaj to~ukaj. i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a saʡo~usi to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, satapaŋ sa a maɾafas to~u *** o~ufaɬ~ɮ, i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u pato~ukiaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ro~ujtin ʦiɾafas to~u **** o~ufaɬ~ɮ. itini a maħapinaŋan ko~u pisaɾinaħɾinaħ a maro~uʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. i saʡajaʡajaw ħo~u i, o~u matajaɾaj a tajni a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, to~u iko~ur to~u i, o~u mafo~urawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. i **** a piso~uɾap maħao~up ko~u **.* % o~u mafo~urawaj tamɬ~ɮaw, *,*% ʦaaj ko~u nani jo~uro~upaaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ʡəɬ~ɮəŋ *.*% o~u nani ro~uma a kitakit no~u jo~uro~upa a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u mafo~urawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u nani fənɾan,to~urki,to~uiʦ,tanmaj,no~urwaj, po~uɾan, iɾako~u ato~u nani ʡajawaj nansɾafo~u. i **** miħəʦa a pisaʡo~usi o~u nani kaʡamisaj jo~uro~upa ira ko~u **,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, nani aʦijaaj ira ko~u **,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, nani afrika ira ko~u *,*** tamaɬ~ɮaw, o~u nani ɾatinamirika ira *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw. so~uwaɾ o~una sifo~uan a so~uwaɾ o~u ro~ujtin so~uwaɾ, o~unini i, o~u kaʡamisaj-ɾo~u~uərman o~uno~u inɬ~ɮo~u-jo~uro~upa rajraj, o~u skantinawija so~uwaɾ ħananaj ħo~u a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, miriniaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tanmaj ato~u no~urwi, nikawrira, o~u ŋiħaʡ ato~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦo~uwa ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ. o~u no~urwi ato~u tanmaj a tamɬ~ɮaw raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj a mafanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ro~ujtin. **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maɾaħəʦi a misaŋaʡ ko~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a rikəʦ no~u so~uwaɾ, o~u maɾasifo~uan a so~uwaɾ ko~u ro~ujtin a so~uwaɾ. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ro~ujtin maɾasifo~uan a so~uwaɾ ħan?ħaɾafin ko~u kaʦaʦo~uɾi to~unini, i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u pasaɬ~ɮak to~u sasaŋaʡən a rikəʦ to~u sapiħajaw to~u maɾo~usifo~uan so~uwaɾ, nikawrira, ʦaaj ka ɾaħəʦi ko~una rikəʦ. o~u sakaaj a so~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ro~ujtin, o~uno~u mamaŋaj ko~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ira ko~u fənɾan so~uwaɾ, mian so~uwaɾ, sami so~uwaɾ, ro~umo~u~u so~uwaɾ ato~u itisjo~u~u so~uwaɾ. masiwar no~u katənak no~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦa to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, o~u ikiris so~uwaɾ maɾasamatənakaj so~uwaɾ itini i ro~ujtin. i iko~ur no~u **** miħəʦa, o~u maɾaħatatanamən ko~uawʦo~uŋ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ko~u ikiris, i iko~ur no~u **** miħəʦa, maɾaħatatanamən no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u ikiris, matija o~u sjpanja so~uwaɾ, to~uib~v so~uwaɾ, franso~u~u so~uwaɾ ato~u itaɾija so~uwaɾ. pito~uo~uran iʡajaw no~u ** siʦi, mitaʡo~uŋ to~u kawakawas no~u kaʡamisaj jo~uro~upa,o~uno~u to~uʡasan ħo~u a pito~uo~uran ko~unini, o~u o~u~upo~usaɾa pitaʡo~uŋan i, o~u kaħiʦəran no~u mito~uo~uraj ko~unini. taħira to~u saka ** siʦi miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kristo~u pito~uo~uran, mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u rikəʦ no~u kitakit miɾaɾaŋ to~uno~u to~uʡasan a pito~uo~uran, taŋasa i saka ** siʦi ta maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~uno~u to~uʡasan a pito~uo~uran. i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u pisaɾo~uf to~u pito~uo~uran ʦo~uwa ka pito~uo~ur to~u tinsikiw ko~u ɾaɾo~umaan no~u ħo~uti, o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kristo~u ko~u pito~uo~uran. iko~ur to~uno~u ** siʦi, ta maŋaʡaj ko~u mito~uo~uraj to~u jo~utaja ato~u tinsikiw mipatənak to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paʡo~uripaj i ro~ujtin. **** miħəʦa, mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i rikəʦ ko~u paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ko~u pito~uo~ur sanaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ. **** miħəʦa, ɾaħəʦi ħan to~u a misasip paɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u ro~ujrin kiwkai , ʦaaj to~u nito~uɾo~uʡan no~u kitakit a pito~uo~uran. pakiraən i saʡo~usi, o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ro~ujtin ira ko~u ***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa ko~u naifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ko~u pito~uo~uran, o~u mafo~urawaj a tajni ira ko~u **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u tinsikiw ko~u pito~uo~uran,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mito~uo~uraj to~u saʡətipaj so~uʡəɾinaj kiwkai, ***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u mo~u~uso~u~uɾin. to~uo~urən ko~u saʡo~usi i **** miħəʦa, ira ko~u **% a ro~ujtin tamɬ~ɮaw paso~uʡəɾin to~u kawas, maħao~up ko~u **% tamɬ~ɮaw pakaso~uʡəɾin iraaj ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ʡiʦəɾ no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ ato~u ʡo~urip, **% ʦaaj ka paso~uʡəɾin to~u kawas ato~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ ato~u ʡo~urip. o~u o~u~upo~usaɾa sikjo~u ətaɾ , i **** miħəʦa a mapatirəŋ, o~u aniniaj a kiwkai i, i ****-**** miħəʦa a patirəŋən. o~u ʡakawaŋ i, ira ko~u ***.* ɾajaʡ,o~u sakakaaj i skantinawija ko~unini a kiwkai. jo~u patirəŋ i, o~u kiwkai no~u ro~uma tinsikiw, o~u pipaʦaɾo~ukan to~u ħo~unti ato~u pitaɬ~ɮəman itini, iko~ur no~u pisaɾo~uf to~u pito~uo~uran, o~u kiwkai no~u ro~ujtin ko~u maro~uʡaj itini, anini i, o~u kamaro~uʡan no~u o~u~upo~usaɾa sikjo~u. paʦəfafaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ " ,"po~uʦkət faʦts: statistiʦs o~un intə*ratio~un" ,isb~b~vn **-*****-**-* - *************. *****,"po~uʦkət faʦts: statistiʦs o~un intə*ratio~un" ,isb~b~vn **-*****-**-* - ********** / . ɾanɬ~ɮəs, ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ (* *o~u~uɾj ****). "swəɬ~ɮisħ b~b~vəʦo~uməs o~uffiʦiaɾ ʡmain ɾaŋo~u~ua*əʡ". tħə ɾo~uʦaɾ. tħəɾo~uʦaɾ.sə. rətriəb~vəɬ~ɮ ** *o~u~uɾj ****. " "(sb~vənskan b~b~vɾir intə o~uffiʦiəɾɾt spr*k) "(prəssməɬ~ɮɬ~ɮəɾanɬ~ɮə: i ɬ~ɮa* b~b~v*rjar spr*kɾa*ən **ɾɾa!) ****-**-**.(pɬ~ɮf . ʦia ***
